[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Moyan''' was a [[Color/Legends|black]]-[[Hair/Legends|furred]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Tactical officer/Legends|tactical officer]] on board [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
